future_consumers: 5.3.4-style future subtask running the full 3-arm benchmark against the combined corpus + ground truth (out of scope here; this subtask keeps the public API (chunk_document, VectorRagIndex, retrieve_documents) compatible with RawDocument/RelevantDoc shapes so that future work is a straightforward wiring exercise, not a rewrite)

local_model: nomic-embed-text (pulled via `ollama pull nomic-embed-text`, local Ollama server, no API key, no paid provider)

risk_notes: Real recall test requires a reachable local Ollama server with nomic-embed-text pulled; test module mirrors agents/ingestion/test_e2e_smoke.py's skip-if-unreachable convention so it fails closed (skip) rather than silently mocking in environments lacking this, and fails loud (real assertion failure) when the model is reachable but retrieval quality is poor.

Cosine similarity implemented in pure Python (no numpy) -- fine at fixture scale; a future real-corpus-scale benchmark subtask may need a faster/ANN implementation, explicitly disclosed as a future concern in architecture-discovery.md, not addressed here.
No changes to any existing module -- zero regression risk to already-shipped code (5.1.1-5.1.3, ingestion, query, engine).
backward_compatibility: N/A -- all new files, no existing call sites to break.

constraint_compliance.no_live_benchmark_execution: not attempted; scoped strictly to fixture corpus + fixture queries per explicit instruction
constraint_compliance.existing_dependency_reuse: httpx (already a dependency) used for the new Ollama /api/embed HTTP call; no new pip package added
